diagnostic.help: remove the reversed wire; wires run output to input
diagnostic.message: conflicting wire facts reverse the same endpoints

related.message: first wire between these endpoints was declared here

source.text:
composition wired_pulse_conflicting_wire

use "pulse_source.petrinet" as source
use "pulse_sink.petrinet" as sink
wire source.(pulse_out) -> sink.(pulse_in)
wire sink.(pulse_in) -> source.(pulse_out)
